caveats: This sweep samples bounded proof-capable targets; it does not prove every song or mix combination.
Objective guardrails do not prove subjective listening quality.
Skipped songs or parts without proof windows are reported as coverage, not proof failures.

metadata.purpose: Slower pre-deploy exploration sweep over the current Neon song catalog for batching deterministic audio/app guardrail failures before release.
required_receipts: all sampled entries pass objective guardrails
proof-window declarations match active lanes or fall back to generated windows
state restoration passes after the sweep
does_not_prove: every possible song/mix combination beyond the configured bounds
that any candidate mix is aesthetically better

viewports.name: desktop
viewports.title: LilArcade
viewports.body_text_sample: 🕹️ LilArcade RHYTHM LAB Neon Step Sequencer Paint a 4-bar, 64-step loop and keep the arcade pulsing. My Sequences MONKBERRY MOON DELIGHT Bass Trainer Open Playalong Play All Shuffle Clear Debug Meters Off Verbose Off Auto-Mix Pass Auto-mix ready VERBOSE LOGS TEMPO 98 BPM Audio ready SONG Blank Yakety Yak (Dark) (G) Monkberry Moon Delight (Sheet) (C minor) Monkberry Moon Delight (Full OMR) (C minor) Monkberry Moon Delight (Tab) (C minor) Dark Progression (Em) Midnight Protocol (Am) INSTRUMENT LANES Power, source, mix, and editor focus in one place ON DRUMS Kick, snare, hat, clap, rim 160 HITS DRUM SOURCE Sampled Kit Samples + Synth Synth Drums LEVEL 0.49X Mute Sampled Kit Kick 0.90x Snare 0.67x Hat 0.34x Clap 0.27x Rim 0.29x ON BASS Low end foundation 58 NOTES BASS INSTRUMENT Dub Bass Electric Bass + Sub Electric Bass Finger Bass (SoundFont) Synth Bass LEVEL 0.62X PAN 0.01L Mute TONE Electric Bass + Sub ON VOCAL MELODY Vocal melody line 72 NOTES VOCAL INSTRUMENT Synth Vocal Voice Oohs Choir Aahs Voice Lead Synth Choir LEVEL 0.84X PAN 0.02R DELAY 0.07 Mute TONE Voice Oohs ON PAD / KEYS Harmony bed 72 NOTES KEYS INSTRUMENT Piano + Pad Piano Synth Pad LEVEL 0.28X PAN 0.22L DELAY 0.10 Mute TONE Piano + Pad ON GUITAR / LEAD LINE Hooks and strums 528 NOTES GUITAR INSTRUMENT Guitar + Synth Electric Guitar Synth Lead Line LEVEL 0.65X PAN 0.26R DELAY 0.11 Mute TONE Guitar + Synth PART: A B C D E F G H I + ARRANGEMENT 1 A B C D E F G H I · · · · · · · 17 · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · 33 · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · 49 · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · FOCUS Mix Drums Bass Vocal Melody Pad Guitar Trainer Meters BAR − 4 + 1 2 3 4 INSTRUMENT TRAINER 8 notes in part A PART A PLAYING Bass INSTRUMENT Drums Bass Vocal Melody Pad / Keys Guitar / Lead Line WINDOW 1 bar 2 bars 4 bars Full Mix Focus Up Solo Pick a part, slow the tempo, and ride the hit line. Use the bar buttons above to jump sections. G1 G#1 A1 A#1 B1 C2 G1 G#1 A1 A#1 C2 BAR 1 BAR 2 BAR 3 C2 C2 A#1 A#1 A1 HIT LINE Tip: layer a simple kick on 1/5/9/13 and sprinkle hats in between. Works best with headphones.
